title: resolve-submit-inputs output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``resolve-submit-inputs`` envelope.

``stage_reached`` is the deterministic dispatch the agent used to walk
by hand. ``needs_decision`` flags the outcomes that require a caller
decision — the decision-as-data shape (#231): the composite ran every
deterministic branch; only the genuine judgement (resume-vs-fresh on a
live prior, or the scaffold sub-interview) is handed back.

stage_reached.description: Which stage the chain reached / stopped at.
stage_reached.title: Stage Reached

needs_decision.description: True for prior_run_found (only the user picks resume-vs-fresh) and needs_scaffold_interview (the headless worker can't run the scaffold interview); False for the clean resolved terminal.
needs_decision.title: Needs Decision

reason.description: Human-readable summary of the outcome / what must be decided.
reason.title: Reason

run_id.description: The computed run_id (<run_name>-<sha[:8]>); set on every stage.
run_id.title: Run Id

cmd_sha.description: Full 64-char cmd_sha hash of the materialized task list; set on every stage.
cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha

submit_spec.description: The built + validated submit-flow spec (a submit_flow.input.json dict), ready to hand to submit-pipeline / submit-flow. Set only on stage_reached='resolved'.
submit_spec.title: Submit Spec

sidecar_path.description: Absolute path of the per-run sidecar written on the 'resolved' path (.hpc/runs/<run_id>.json) — the #171 write-first precondition is satisfied, so submit-pipeline can run directly. Set only on stage_reached='resolved'.
sidecar_path.title: Sidecar Path

prior_run_id.description: Resume context — the matching live prior run's run_id on stage_reached='prior_run_found'; else null.
prior_run_id.title: Prior Run Id

prior_status.description: Resume context — the live prior's lifecycle status (complete / in_flight) on stage_reached='prior_run_found'; else null.
prior_status.title: Prior Status
